commit.message:
add: Round 2 goldfish results for Etali (Games 6 & 7) — T14 estimated and T11

Game 6 (no acceleration hand): Utopia Sprawl T1 builds strong mana base but
zero ramp spells mean Etali (card 21+) can't be cast until T14 when drawn;
mana fully online by T8 via Skyshroud Claim.

Game 7 (no Red until T7): Rhythm of the Wild T3 + Cursed Mirror T5 enable
Somberwald Sage T6 on Green-only mana; Mountain arrives T7 completing color
requirements; Etali (card 18) drawn T11 and cast immediately with Rhythm riot
haste for an immediate attack trigger.

Updated 7-game averages: 8.3 all games, 6.0 excluding dead hands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add memory path sigma floor to prevent g_inv divergence

Memory path's uncapped precision created a positive feedback loop:
memory stored physics-specific g patterns, retrieved them with
precision >> transition (11), causing g_inv to triple by iter 700.
Floor at 0.35 caps memory precision at 8.2, enforcing hierarchy:
transition (11) > memory (8) > observation (4).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Integrate Skills/ into scanner: 28-agent swarm + 12 exploit chains

AI Pentester (lib/ai-pentester.js):
- Now uses 6 specialist swarm personas from Skills/agents/xai-swarm.md:
  REAPER (component exploitation), SERPENT (secret hunting),
  PHANTOM (crypto weakness), ORACLE (API attack surface),
  WRAITH (data leakage), SPECTRE (anti-analysis bypass)
- Runs 3 agents in parallel per scan (REAPER+SERPENT+ORACLE for Android,
  REAPER+WRAITH+SPECTRE for iOS)
- Each agent has adversarial persona with specific output format
- Builds evidence payload from actual extracted files

AI Correlation (lib/claude.js):
- Now uses OMEGA persona from Skills/agents/xai-swarm.md
  (supreme synthesis agent, final layer of 28-agent swarm)
- Includes all 12 exploit chain patterns from Skills/agents/exploit-chains.md:
  ADB backup→credential theft, exported Activity→WebView XSS→token theft,
  Firebase key→open RTDB→mass exfil, SSL bypass→MITM→cred harvest,
  JWT confusion→impersonation, ContentProvider SQLi→DB dump,
  root Toast→Frida→biometric bypass→payment skip,
  deep link CSRF→OAuth hijack, AWS key→S3 exfil→malware plant,
  FLAG_SECURE missing→screenshot leak, DexClassLoader→RCE,
  ADB backup+long-lived tokens→persistent access
- AI matches findings against known chain patterns

commit.message:
Add --read-ttl-ms flag to shard binary

The shard exposed --prepare-ttl-ms at deploy time but not --read-ttl-ms,
leaving operators unable to tune how long a pure-reader transaction's
start_ts anchors the MVCC compaction watermark without recompiling.

Add --read-ttl-ms N alongside --prepare-ttl-ms; it sets ShardState::read_ttl
(already existed, defaulting to 30 s) from the command line.  The two TTLs
are independent: --prepare-ttl-ms governs prepared-entry eviction;
--read-ttl-ms governs read-tracking eviction (ShardExpireRead in the spec).

Tests: 5 new cases covering the happy path, independence from prepare_ttl,
zero value, missing value, and non-numeric value.  ShardExpireRead ER1-ER4
traces from the TLA+ spec are the source for these test cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Complete Product Entity System: UI panels, name sync, productId linking

Implements all remaining items from cheerful-cooking-deer plan:

Product Creation expanded entity panel:
- Shows COG, Product Type, Price, Discount%, Compare At when expanding a product row
- Fields read from/write to the product entity via useProductsStore
- Styled next to existing size chart panel

Cross-store name propagation:
- Changing product name in Research updates Product Creation, Creative Generator, Ad Creator
- Changing product name in Product Creation updates Research (reverse sync)
- No circular recursion: forward uses setState, reverse goes through updateSheetProduct

Import flow:
- Now sets pipelineStatus='imported' alongside testingStatus='Imported'

API route product_id propagation:
- push-to-shopify: updates products.shopify_product_id + pipeline_status
- push-to-meta: propagates product_id from ad_creator_campaigns to ad_campaigns
- sync-meta-campaigns: backfills product_id via ad_creator_campaigns.meta_campaign_id lookup
- generate-copy: references products table (not research_products)
- sync-profit-data: includes product_id in COG query

Module productId linking:
- CreativeBatchQueue: groups by productId (falls back to name)
- AdCreatorSheet: matches creatives to campaigns by productId first
- PerAdCard: COG lookup uses productId, passes to upsertCog
- Profit Tracker: dual COG maps (byProductId + byName), prefers productId
- Creative generation: propagates productId from BatchQueueProduct to ProductCreative

Persist onboarding answers to localStorage so pitches load on direct navigation

Previously, personalized book pitches only appeared when navigating directly
from onboarding (via React Router location.state). Visiting /recommendations
from the nav bar skipped pitches entirely and fell back to generic blurbs.

RecommendationsPage when location.state is unavailable.

commit.message:
refactor: Search → Sourcing Workbench hard reframe — 5영역 OS 구조 전환

검색 페이지 polish가 아닌 interaction model 자체를 변경:

A. SearchUtilityBar: hero 검색박스 → compact h-8 유틸리티 바
   - mode switcher/example queries/recognized fields 제거
   - 검색 입력 + 필터 트리거 + 상태만 남김

B. ResultWorkbenchList: 상품 카드 → dense workbench row
   - isInRequest 상태 마커 추가 (비교/견적 badge)
   - 이미 담긴 경우 primary CTA 비활성화
   - row click → right rail open (launch rule)

C. RightContextRail: 조건부 → persistent panel
   - 미선택 시 empty state ("제품을 선택하세요")
   - 소싱 상태 섹션 (비교/견적 포함 여부)
   - 다음 단계 제안 (비교 검토/견적 검토 work window launch)
   - onOpenCompareWindow/onOpenRequestWindow 콜백

D. WorkbenchTray: passive basket → active tray
   - 비교 segment (count + candidate pills + 비교 검토 CTA)
   - 견적 segment (count + total + 견적 검토 CTA)
   - 2개 미만 시 "2개 이상 필요" 경고
   - work window launch entry point

E. CenterWorkWindow: placeholder → 실제 작업면
   - 비교 검토 window (후보 목록 + 가격 + 비교 분석 시작 CTA)
   - 견적 검토 window (품목 목록 + 수량 조절 + 견적서 작성 CTA)
   - 닫기/복귀 + parent context 유지

제거: StickySearchBar hero, ExcelUploadResult/ProtocolUploadResult mock,
      제품 상세 Dialog, 하단 floating basket, 좌측 filter sidebar column

Fix discover page RLS issue by using service role client

The anon/cookie-based client meant logged-in users could only see
their own museum's objects due to owner RLS policies. Using the
service role key (server-only) bypasses RLS so all discoverable
collections are visible to everyone, regardless of auth state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement Clojure compiler front-end with Rust fallback and fix array-map promotion

Add a Clojure-based ANF lowering and escape analysis front-end that produces
IR as plain Clojure data maps, converted back to Rust IrFunction via a new
ir_convert module. The AOT driver tries the Clojure path first and falls back
to the existing Rust implementation on failure.

New files:
- ir_convert.rs: Value → IrFunction/Block/Inst/Terminator conversion
- clojure/compiler/ir.cljrs: IR data constructors + atom-based builder context
- clojure/compiler/known.cljrs: Known function symbol → keyword resolution
- clojure/compiler/anf.cljrs: ANF lowering (all special forms + calls)
- clojure/compiler/escape.cljrs: Escape analysis on IR data maps

Also fixes PersistentArrayMap::from_pairs dropping entries after promotion
threshold — remaining iterator items are now properly collected into the
promoted vector with duplicate-key handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

index.html, causing a client-side 404.

commit.message:
Break transition model collapse via sigma floor and Gaussian NLL

Training diverges after ~iter 700 due to a degenerate fixed-point where
sigma_g_path → 0 causes g_inf → g_gen, zeroing transition error EMA and
reinforcing low sigma. This starves the observation and memory pathways
needed for cross-environment generalization.

Three interventions:
1. Sigma floor (0.3) in _gen_g() ensures observations always contribute
   ≥8% to g_inf via precision weighting
2. Replace squared-error L_g with Gaussian NLL that calibrates transition
   uncertainty — penalizes both over- and under-confidence
3. Retimed training schedule: memory at full strength by iter 1500,
   transition model delayed to iter 5000, permanent p sparsity,
   10x stronger g invariance, earlier/sharper memory trust sigmoid

Also fixes:
- inv_var_weight NaN risk: clamp sigma ≥ 1e-4
- no_ema ablation TypeError: use decay=0.0 instead of None

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: allow agent to stay silent when user asks not to respond (#717)

Add system prompt instruction telling the LLM it's OK to return empty text
when the user explicitly asks for silence. Soften the re-prompt wording so
the LLM can intentionally return empty after tool calls. Fix SSE future
resolution for empty replies so webchat clients don't hang. Skip rendering
empty assistant message bubbles in the frontend.

Closes #706

feat: 6-step pipeline with validation gates

Implemented iterative generation pipeline:
  Step 1: DBC validate (12/12 PASS)
  Step 2+3: DBC → ARXML (20 E2E protections, 0 ref errors)
  Step 4: ARXML validate vs DBC (6/6 PASS)
  Step 5: ARXML → C configs (93 files)
  Step 6: C config syntax check (24/38 pass — needs platform includes)

Pipeline stops on first failure. Each step reads only previous output.
Re-run individual steps: make -f Makefile.pipeline step1

SC_Status E2E deviation documented (custom E2E without DataID nibble).

docs: pipeline architecture — iterative 6-step with validation gates

Lesson learned: one-shot pipeline can't catch errors early or re-run
individual steps. Redesigned as 6 discrete steps:

1. DBC validate (12-point audit)
2. DBC → ARXML base (signals, PDUs, frames)
3. Enrich ARXML (E2E, SWCs, connectors from sidecar)
4. ARXML validate (E2E count, traceability, signal consistency)
5. ARXML → C configs (per ECU)
6. C config validate (E2E match, syntax check)

Each step: reads previous output, validates, produces next artifact.
STOP on failure. Re-run from failed step only.

Implementation via Makefile targets: step1..step6 + full 'generate'.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(codegen): Phase 1 — arxmlgen reads E2E from ARXML, not DBC

Data flow now: DBC → dbc2arxml → ARXML (E2E protection set) → arxmlgen → C configs

Changes:
- config.py: added e2e_source="arxml" option
- reader.py: _apply_arxml_e2e() parses END-TO-END-PROTECTION elements
  from ARXML, extracts DataID and MaxDeltaCounterInit per PDU
- reader.py: re-populates e2e_data_ids after E2E source applied
  (fixes timing: auto-generation ran before E2E source was set)
- project.yaml: e2e_source changed from "dbc" to "arxml"

Result: 20 protections read from ARXML, 140 PDUs matched.
All E2E DataIDs generated including previously missing:
  FZC_E2E_BRAKE_FAULT_DATA_ID = 0x0B
  FZC_E2E_MOTOR_CUTOFF_REQ_DATA_ID = 0x0C

Traceability: HARA → SG → DBC → ARXML E2E → codegen → C config
Every E2E DataID now traceable through the full chain.

commit.message:
Replace 'Why This Book' blurb with 3-sentence tailored pitch inside recommendation card

- Add optional pitch prop to RecommendationCard; when present, renders the
  3 tailored sentences (challenge/solution/outcome) in place of the generic
  explanation blurb; falls back to blurb if no pitch available
- Remove separate book-pitch div below cards in RecommendationsPage — pitch
  now lives inside the card itself
- Remove unused .recommendation-with-pitch, .book-pitch, .book-pitch__text CSS

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: readar
repository.description: Personalized book-recommendation engine for entrepreneurs.

commit.message:
chore: remove CLAUDE.md from public repo and update .gitignore

CLAUDE.md contained infrastructure details (server paths, deploy workflow,
hosting platform) that should not be public. File kept locally only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
